goal: exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and not is_eps_adherent_to_set(s, x, k0) }
proof: function(x0: Set[Real], x1: Real) { not forall(x2: Real) { not x2.is_positive or is_eps_adherent_to_set(x0, x1, x2) } or is_adherent_point_of_set(x0, x1) }(s, x)

goal: exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and not is_eps_adherent_to_set(s, x, k0) }
proof: function(x0: Real) { not (x0.is_positive and not is_eps_adherent_to_set(s, x, x0)) }(eps)

goal: exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and not is_eps_adherent_to_set(s, x, k0) }

proof: not forall(x0: Real) { not x0.is_close(x, eps) or x0 ∈ s.c } or not x ∈ s.c or not eps.is_positive
let w0: Real satisfy { w0.is_close(x, eps) and not w0 ∈ s.c }
function(x0: Real) { not x0.is_close(x, eps) or x0 ∈ s.c }(w0)
function(x0: Set[Real]) { forall(x1: Real) { not x1 ∈ x0 or is_interior_point(x0, x1) } = is_open_set(x0) }(s.c)
let w0: Real satisfy { w0 ∈ s.c and not is_interior_point(s.c, w0) }
function(x0: Set[Real], x1: Real) { not x1 ∈ x0.c or not is_closed_set(x0) or is_interior_point(x0.c, x1) }(s, w0)
